name: Benigno Family Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped nuts (I use filberts or pecans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter.
2. Add the eggs and beat well.
3. Gradually add the sugar, beating until smooth.
4. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
5. Add the sifted flour mixture to the bowl gradually, mixing at medium speed.
6. Mix in the chopped nuts and anisette.
7. Spoon the dough into two cookie sheets, forming four straight lines (loaf-style).
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
9. Allow cooling for 10 minutes.
10. Slice the cooled biscuits into 1-inch slices (keep the ends for later).
11. Turn each slice so that a flat side is down, return them to the oven.
12. Brown on one side for 5-10 minutes (depending on desired color), then turn over and brown on the other side.
13. Allow to cool completely before storing in plastic bags or an air-tight container. These keep well for up to 6 weeks and can be frozen.
